features.name: vpi callback at time zero with vpi_put_value
features.description: Code should include a VPI callback registered at time 0 combined with vpi_put_value() to set a signal value, where the callback fires before the simulator finishes pre-initial signal initialization
features.snippet:
vpiHandle cb_h; cb_h = vpi_register_cb(cbAfterDelay, 0); vpi_put_value(sig, &val, vpiNoDelay, vpiNoReturn);
// T0 callback fires, but signal gets overwritten to 'z' by simulator's pre-initial setup

features.name: vpi callback delayed at simulation start
features.description: Code should include a VPI callback registered before simulation time 0 using vpi_register_cb with cbAfterDelay and zero delay, which can conflict with the simulator's internal signal initialization at T0
features.snippet:
PLI_INT32 delay = 0; vpi_register_cb(cbAfterDelay, delay);
// When delay is 0 and callback is registered in pre-initial phase
